description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Unit test that runs on pull requests, pushes to the master branch, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has multiple jobs: build, test, render_gallery, and tests_complete. The build job compiles the code in multiple configurations using a matrix strategy on ubuntu-latest runners, then uploads the installation directory as an artifact. The test job depends on build, downloads the installation directory, and runs tests in multiple configurations on different runners. The render_gallery job renders gallery images. The tests_complete job requires test and render_gallery to complete.
